# uploadPlatformFile

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

Upload a file: resolves the bucket by key, creates the file row, and returns a presigned PUT URL. (api target)

## Usage

```bash
constructive-functions api:upload-platform-file --input.bucketKey <String> --input.contentHash <String> --input.contentType <String> --input.size <Int> --input.filename <String> --input.key <String>
```

## Examples

### Run uploadPlatformFile

```bash
constructive-functions api:upload-platform-file --input.bucketKey <String> --input.contentHash <String> --input.contentType <String> --input.size <Int> --input.filename <String> --input.key <String>
```
